description: Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting that scans for generators for which the speed deviation is more than a specified threshold. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = set_genspdev(status, speed, trip) ierr, status, speed, trip = set_genspdev()
python_syntax: ierr = set_genspdev(status, speed, trip) ierr, status, speed, trip = set_genspdev()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: speed
parameters.description: Speed deviation threshold. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: trip
parameters.description: Monitor trip flag. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive). All machines whose MVAR ratings are above this threshold will be scanned).

status.description: enable scanning for generator speeds exceeding speed deviation threshold.

error_codes.description: invalid speed deviation threshold - must be >0.0.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
